emails.subject: Re: Priority Legislation
emails.body: Re: Priority Legislation Any news from the litigation front with UC/CSU?

emails.subject: Re: Priority Legislation
emails.body: Re: Priority Legislation My understanding is that it's languishing but still has a decent chance of getting through. The question is when. I'll try to get some more firm information and get back to you later in the afternoon. Best, Jeff

emails.body: Re: Priority Legislation My understanding is that it's languishing but still has a decent chance of getting through. The question is when. I'll try to get some more firm information and get back to you later in the afternoon. Best, Jeff

emails.subject: Re: Priority Legislation
emails.body: Re: Priority Legislation Any news from the litigation front with UC/CSU?

emails.subject: Re: Priority Legislation
emails.body: The state submitted an amicus brief which we objected to. The hearing is the 11th. we are preparing for the hearing. It is in SF so you are welcome to come. From: Jeff Dasovich@ENRON on 04/03/2001 10:51 AM Sent by: Jeff Dasovich@ENRON

emails.subject: Re: Priority Legislation
emails.body: Thanks. Best of luck in the prep. If I can be of any help, you folks know how to find me. Vicki Sharp@EES 04/03/2001 10:59 AM
